hypothesis.claim: A nervous-system/cognition observation packet can be organized into clinician- or researcher-facing evidence without converting subjective state descriptions into diagnosis, treatment, causality, or certainty claims.
hypothesis.source_status: assistant-generated research-organization hypothesis; no patient record ingestion
hypothesis.claim_status: semi-executable evidence-organization test, not a medical claim
hypothesis.missingness: explicit states required: observed, unknown, not_collected, redacted, not_applicable
hypothesis.revision_reason: third Hypothesis Test Forge run; adds scoring rubric for symptom-to-question-prep boundary control
hypothesis.implementation_status: JSON scoring rubric with pass/fail criteria
hypothesis.testability: Can be used manually or by a validator to score MC packets before promotion into evidence maps
hypothesis.falsification_route: Fails if a packet promotes subjective observation into diagnosis, treatment, unsupported causality, emergency triage, or certainty without evidence anchors
hypothesis.next_executable_action: Create validator that applies this rubric to synthetic nervous-system/cognition packets

score_dimensions.name: observation_specificity_score
score_dimensions.score_0: No concrete observation or only global feeling labels
score_dimensions.score_1: Observation present but lacks time, trigger, context, or body/cognition domain
score_dimensions.score_2: Observation includes domain plus at least one context, timing, or trigger anchor
score_dimensions.score_3: Observation includes domain, timing, context, intensity/frequency, and contrast case

score_dimensions.name: missingness_integrity_score
score_dimensions.score_0: Unknown data treated as absent or normal
score_dimensions.score_1: Some unknowns labeled, but inconsistent states remain
score_dimensions.score_2: All unknowns labeled but not separated from interpretation
score_dimensions.score_3: Observed, unknown, not_collected, redacted, and not_applicable are explicitly separated

score_dimensions.name: boundary_violation_count
violation_examples: claims symptom absence from missing data

score_dimensions.name: question_prep_usefulness_score
score_dimensions.score_0: No usable question or next observation
score_dimensions.score_1: Vague next step without measurable variable
score_dimensions.score_2: Includes at least one clinician/researcher-facing question tied to measurable variables
score_dimensions.score_3: Includes prioritized questions, observation plan, variables, and falsification condition

score_dimensions.name: causality_overreach_count
score_dimensions.description: Counts claims that convert correlation, sequence, recurrence, metaphor, or felt sense into causal proof

score_dimensions.name: privacy_leak_count
score_dimensions.description: Counts direct identifiers, precise addresses, phone numbers, full dates of birth, record numbers, or unnecessary third-party identifiers

example_safe_output_shape.safe_summary: The packet organizes subjective cognition/body-state observations into variables and questions without diagnosis or treatment claims.
question_prep: What observations would help distinguish state-dependent initiation difficulty from fatigue, pain, anxiety, medication effect, sleep disruption, or other explanations?
Which variables should be tracked before a clinical appointment without assuming cause?
example_safe_output_shape.not_allowed: Do not infer diagnosis, urgency, treatment, dosage, or cure from this packet.
